evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the conversion link from lead to customer/order/opportunity. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or records that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The existing evidence focuses on bookings and member invitations but lacks the necessary details to confirm the requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive status.
